title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at CMA CGM India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at CMA CGM India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Distribution Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
